audiences.name: Small-check investors
audiences.whyTheyMatter: These are the ~$10K check-size investors BTC is building distribution with. Webinar content is a primary mechanism to reach them at scale.
audiences.angle: Climate Tech Exit Lab preview webinars give them access to the investment framework and deal thesis before committing capital. Content builds trust and positions BTC as the knowledgeable guide.

audiences.name: Climate tech founders
audiences.whyTheyMatter: Founders in the climate tech space are both a BTC audience and a deal source. Webinars that bring value to founders build BTC credibility and pipeline.
audiences.angle: Operator-focused content on exits, fundraising strategy, and capital access in climate tech. Position BTC as the fund that actually understands the founder journey.

audiences.name: Climate tech operators
audiences.whyTheyMatter: Operators are the connective tissue of the climate tech ecosystem. They talk to founders, investors, and institutions. Building BTC visibility with operators compounds over time.
audiences.angle: Practical, tactical content on how climate tech organizations scale, raise, and exit. Operators share and amplify content that gives them real tools.

audiences.name: Canadian impact foundations
audiences.whyTheyMatter: Toronto Foundation Fund, Atmospheric Fund, Boann, and Equality Fund are the ABM targets for end-of-summer sponsorship or LP conversations. These are relationship-first, multi-touch engagements.
audiences.angle: BTC as the infrastructure for impact capital reaching climate tech at the earliest stages. The story is about additionality — BTC gets to deals that mainstream VC ignores.

audiences.name: Webinar partner organizations
audiences.whyTheyMatter: SVX, Ontario Clean Tech Industry Association, Clean Tech North, KAFD, and Good Investor (Tim) are Bryan's network picks for co-branded webinar partners. They have the distribution BTC needs.
audiences.angle: Pitch the webinar as a value-add for their audience — BTC brings the content and the Climate Tech Exit Lab framework, they bring the distribution. Co-branded and mutually beneficial.
